name: add_upsell
description: Apply one relevant add-on to an existing confirmed booking and return the updated total. Use this only in the Contextual Upsell phase, only after the guest accepts the offer. The agent must read the returned updated_total back exactly. Never call before a booking is confirmed; never apply an add-on the guest declined.

confirmation_number.description: The confirmation number returned by create_booking, e.g. 'BK-7824091'.

addon_id.description: Identifier of the add-on to apply, e.g. 'miiamo-journey-package', 'lauberge-couples-package', 'miiamo-intention-setting'.

returns.description: The applied add-on, its price, and the updated total, plus a payload that renders a confirmation_update card and updates the confirmation page total in place. Expected shape:
